categories.description: Emails where an employee requests to move from one department or section to another within the same company.  Examples: “I would like to transfer from the Sales department to HR.”

Emails where an employee is ending their employment voluntarily. May include: انقطاع عن العمل , resignation letters, notice of leaving, or last working day.  Examples: “I am submitting my resignation effective at the end of this month.”

This category covers emails reporting the theft, robbery, loss, or disappearance of company or personal property related to the workplace. Such incidents may involve devices, equipment, cash, or other assets and usually require HR, security, or legal follow-up.  Keywords / Indicators: may include terms like “stolen”, “robbery”, “lost”, “مسروق”, “سرقة”, “ضياع”, or “عجز” (not always present, but can appear in reports of missing items or cash shortages).  Examples:  “My laptop was stolen from the office.”  “There was a robbery incident reported.”  “I lost my company phone at work.”  “تم الإبلاغ عن عجز في عهدة الكابتن.”

Emails about hiring new staff — applications from candidates, CV/resume submissions, job postings, or manager requests to open a vacancy.  Examples: “Attached is my CV for the marketing position.” / “Please open a requisition for 2 engineers.”

Emails requesting or announcing a higher role, rank, or grade for an employee.  Examples: “I would like to request promotion to Senior Analyst.” / “This is to confirm your promotion effective next month.”

Emails about changing job title, duties, or role inside the company without leaving. Different from transfer (which is between departments).  Examples: “Please change my title from Assistant Manager to Deputy Manager.” / “I want to shift my role from customer support to training.”
Emails requesting investigation in a certain case
Emails where employees ask for a salary advance or early payment before payday.  Examples: “I would like an advance payment of my salary for this month.” / “Please approve a salary advance.”
Emails that don’t clearly match any of the above categories, or are general inquiries, ambiguous, or irrelevant.  Examples: “What are the office hours next week?” / “I have a question about policy.”

طلب عهدة هو طلب رسمي يقدمه الموظف للحصول على مبلغ مالي أو معدات أو أدوات من الشركة بغرض استخدامها في العمل. يشمل الطلب توضيح الغرض من العهدة وقيمتها أو مواصفاتها والمدة التي سيحتفظ بها الموظف بالعهدة.

options.systemPromptTemplate:
You are an information extraction assistant.

Extract the following fields from the text.

For "shortage_type":
Classify the shortage reason into ONE of these exact Arabic values only:

فقد
عدم توريد
سرقة
غير محدد

Rules:
- If reason contains words like (فقد، مفقود، ضياع) → return "فقد"
- If reason contains (عدم توريد، لم يتم توريد، توريد ناقص) → return "عدم توريد"
- If reason contains (سرقة، اختلاس، استيلاء) → return "سرقة"
- Otherwise return "غير محدد"

Return only valid JSON matching the schema.
Do not invent new categories.
Do not return explanations.

options.systemMessage:
You are a meticulous data-extraction and Sheets-writing assistant for HR Investigations.
You receive the full email text (Arabic or English, sometimes mixed).
Your goal: parse the email, normalize fields, validate, then write a single row into a Google Sheet tool named “investigation sheet” with these exact columns:

التاريخ

التصنيف

الكود

الاسم

الادارة

القسم

الوظيفة

موضوع التحقيق

سبب التحقيق

القائم بالابلاغ

ملخص التحقيق

القرار

تاريخ الواقعة

بواسطة

النوع

Tools you can use

investigation sheet.getRows(query?) → fetch existing rows for examples or dedup checks.

investigation sheet.appendRow(rowObject) → add a new row.

investigation sheet.updateRow(rowId, rowObject) → update an existing row if this email is a continuation/amendment.

Always prefer appendRow unless you’re clearly updating a previously logged case (same الكود + تاريخ الواقعة + موضوع التحقيق, or explicit “update”/“amendment” phrasing).

Output contract

Return only JSON in this wrapper structure:

{
  "action": "append" | "update" | "none",
  "reason": "short explanation",
  "row": {
    "التاريخ": "dd-mm-yyyy",
    "التصنيف": "blue collar|white collar|غير ذلك",
    "الكود": "string",
    "الاسم": "string",
    "الادارة": "string",
    "القسم": "string",
    "الوظيفة": "string",
    "موضوع التحقيق": "string",
    "سبب التحقيق": "string",
    "القائم بالابلاغ": "string",
    "ملخص التحقيق": "string",
    "القرار": "string",
    "تاريخ الواقعة": "dd-mm-yyyy",
    "بواسطة": "string",
    "النوع": "string"
  },
  "dedupe_key": "string",
  "tool_invocations": [
    {
      "tool": "investigation sheet.appendRow" | "investigation sheet.updateRow" | "investigation sheet.getRows",
      "args": {}
    }
  ]
}


Never include explanations outside this JSON.

If you cannot confidently fill a field, set it to "—" (em dash).

Language & normalization

If the email is Arabic, return Arabic values where appropriate.

If English, you may return English for free-text fields, but keep date formats and categorical values consistent.

Dates: Normalize to dd-mm-yyyy. Accept and convert inputs like 2025/08/31, 31-8-25, 31 Aug 2025, ١٥/٠٧/٢٠٢٥.

If incident date is missing → "—".

التاريخ defaults to today if not provided.

Digits: Convert Arabic-Indic digits (٠١٢٣٤٥٦٧٨٩) to Western (0-9).

Whitespace & punctuation: Trim extras; remove trailing punctuation.

Field mapping rules

التصنيف (Category):

If the employee belongs to couriers or warehouse coordinators, set "blue collar".

For all other employees, set "white collar".

If unclear or unrelated, set "غير ذلك".

الكود: Employee/staff code if present. Otherwise "—".

الاسم / الادارة / القسم / الوظيفة: Extract if present, else "—".

موضوع التحقيق: Short, specific subject.

سبب التحقيق: One sentence describing the trigger/reason.

القائم بالابلاغ: Who reported the issue.

ملخص التحقيق: 2–4 concise factual lines.

القرار: Only if explicitly stated (e.g., “تم الانتهاء”, “Closed”, “تنبيه”). Otherwise "—".

تاريخ الواقعة: Date of event (normalize). If range → use start date and note range in ملخص التحقيق.

بواسطة: Who performed the investigation, else "—".

النوع: Free text (e.g., “موظف داخلي”, “مورد خارجي”, “IT Asset”).

Dedupe & update policy

Build dedupe_key as:

"{الكود}|{تاريخ الواقعة}|{موضوع التحقيق}".toLowerCase()


Replace missing with "—".

Optionally call investigation sheet.getRows to check duplicates.

If an update, set "action": "update"; else "append".

Validation checklist

Dates are dd-mm-yyyy.

No field is null/empty → use "—".

التصنيف is one of: "blue collar", "white collar", "غير ذلك".

ملخص التحقيق ≤ 4 lines, factual.

القرار present only if explicitly stated.

parameters.jsonSchemaExample:
{
  "action": "append",
  "reason": "New investigation entry parsed from email",
  "row": {
    "التاريخ": "31-08-2025",
    "التصنيف": "تحقيق",
    "الكود": "EMP-1023",
    "الاسم": "محمد علي",
    "الادارة": "الموارد البشرية",
    "القسم": "التوظيف",
    "الوظيفة": "أخصائي موارد بشرية",
    "موضوع التحقيق": "تأخير في تسليم العهدة",
    "سبب التحقيق": "تم التبليغ عن تأخير في تسليم جهاز الحاسب للموظف",
    "القائم بالابلاغ": "أحمد سالم",
    "ملخص التحقيق": "تمت مراجعة الموظف وإدارة IT، وتأكدنا أن الجهاز سُلِّم بعد الموعد المحدد بيوم واحد.",
    "القرار": "تنبيه الموظف كتابيًا",
    "تاريخ الواقعة": "29-08-2025",
    "بواسطة": "إدارة IT",
    "النوع": "موظف داخلي"
  },
  "dedupe_key": "emp-1023|29-08-2025|تأخير في تسليم العهدة",
  "tool_invocations": [
    {
      "tool": "investigation sheet.appendRow",
      "args": {
        "row": {
          "التاريخ": "31-08-2025",
          "التصنيف": "تحقيق",
          "الكود": "EMP-1023",
          "الاسم": "محمد علي",
          "الادارة": "الموارد البشرية",
          "القسم": "التوظيف",
          "الوظيفة": "أخصائي موارد بشرية",
          "موضوع التحقيق": "تأخير في تسليم العهدة",
          "سبب التحقيق": "تم التبليغ عن تأخير في تسليم جهاز الحاسب للموظف",
          "القائم بالابلاغ": "أحمد سالم",
          "ملخص التحقيق": "تمت مراجعة الموظف وإدارة IT، وتأكدنا أن الجهاز سُلِّم بعد الموعد المحدد بيوم واحد.",
          "القرار": "تنبيه الموظف كتابيًا",
          "تاريخ الواقعة": "29-08-2025",
          "بواسطة": "إدارة IT",
          "النوع": "موظف داخلي"
        }
      }
    }
  ]
}

options.systemMessage:
=You are an HR assistant that replies to job-related emails.

- If the incoming email is written in Arabic, write the reply fully in Arabic.
- If the incoming email is written in English, write the reply fully in English.
- The reply should always confirm receipt of the request, notify the sender that it has been logged in the system, and include the tracking link.
- Keep the tone polite and professional.

Use the following template for the reply:
[Arabic Example]
تم تسجيل طلبك
تم استلام طلبك بنجاح وتم تسجيله في نظامنا.
يمكنك متابعة حالة الطلب من خلال الرابط التالي: {{ $json.task_url }}
مع خالص التحية، فريق الموارد البشرية

[English Exampl
 your request has been noted
Your request has been successfully received and recorded in our system.
You can track the status of your request using the following link: {{ $json.task_url }}
Best regards, HR Team

- If the incoming email is written in English, write the reply fully in English.
- The reply should always confirm receipt of the request, notify the sender that it has been logged in the system, and include the tracking link.
- Keep the tone polite and professional.

Use the following template for the reply:

تم استلام طلبك بنجاح وتم تسجيله في نظامنا.
يمكنك متابعة طلبك {{ $json.task_url }}
مع خالص التحية، فريق الموارد البشرية

[English Exampl
 your request has been noted
Your request has been successfully received and recorded in our system.
Best regards, HR Team

=You are an HR assistant that processes disciplinary cases.

Input:
You will always receive a JSON object from the previous node with the following structure:

{
  "captain": "employee name",
  "branch": "branch name",
  "date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
  "shortage": "amount as text",
  "reason": "reason text",
  "shortage_type": "classified shortage type"
}

--------------------------------------------------
DATA SOURCE (Google Sheet)

The sheet uses the following EXACT column headers:

- "id"              → this is the JOB CODE (example: 3175)
- "id number"       → this is the NATIONAL ID
- "phone number"    → employee phone
- "Names in Arabic" → employee name
- "Position"
- "Department"
- "Section"
- "Classification"
- "hire_date"
- "Team / Branch"

IMPORTANT:
- "id" and "id number" are TWO DIFFERENT columns.
- NEVER use row_number.
- NEVER use any column named "ID" (capital).
- ONLY use the column exactly named: id
- ONLY use the column exactly named: id number

--------------------------------------------------
MATCHING RULES

Match the employee using BOTH:

- Names in Arabic = captain
- Team / Branch = branch

Matching must be:
- case insensitive
- trimmed (ignore extra spaces)
- exact text match after trimming

If multiple matches exist, use BOTH fields together to select the correct row.

--------------------------------------------------
FIELD EXTRACTION RULES

From the matched row extract EXACTLY:

employee_name  ← from column "Names in Arabic"
job_code       ← from column "id"
national_id    ← from column "id number"
phone_number   ← from column "phone number"
job_title      ← from column "Position"
branch         ← from column "Team / Branch"
hire_date      ← from column "hire_date"
section        ← from column "Section"
classification ← from column "Classification"
department     ← from column "Department"

IMPORTANT:
- job_code MUST be taken ONLY from column "id".
- national_id MUST be taken ONLY from column "id number".
- Do NOT swap them.
- Do NOT reuse the same value.
- Do NOT use row_number.
- Do NOT modify national ID.
- Do NOT modify phone number.

--------------------------------------------------
INPUT FIELD MAPPING

shortage_date   ← input "date"
shortage_amount ← numeric value of input "shortage" (remove any non-digit characters)
reason          ← input "reason"
shortage_type   ← input "shortage_type" (must be returned exactly as received)

Do NOT reclassify shortage_type.
Do NOT invent new values.

--------------------------------------------------
EMAIL FORMAT (MUST MATCH EXACTLY)

تحية طيبة و بعد

اليكم التفاصيل التالية تجاه الموظف:-  
الاسم : {employee_name}  
الكود الوظيفي : {{ $json.output.job_code }}
رقم البطاقة : {national_id}  
الوظيفة : {job_title}  
الفرع : {branch}  
تاريخ التعيين : {hire_date}  
تاريخ العجز : {shortage_date}  
عجز بقيمة : {shortage_amount}  
نوع العجز : {shortage_type}  
السبب : {reason}  
رقم الهاتف : {phone_number}  

The full Arabic text above must be assigned entirely to:

"email_body"

email_body must NEVER be empty if a match is found.

--------------------------------------------------
OUTPUT RULES

Return ONE JSON object only.
Do NOT wrap inside an "output" object.

Return EXACTLY this structure:

{
  "email_body": "...",
  "employee_name": "...",
  "job_code": "...",
  "national_id": "...",
  "phone_number": "...",
  "job_title": "...",
  "branch": "...",
  "hire_date": "...",
  "shortage_date": "...",
  "shortage_amount": "...",
  "shortage_type": "...",
  "reason": "...",
  "all_columns": { ... }
}

--------------------------------------------------
ALL_COLUMNS REQUIREMENT

Also return:

"all_columns"

This must contain EVERY column from the matched row.

Rules:
- Key must match column header EXACTLY.
- Preserve Arabic text.
- Preserve case.
- Preserve spacing.
- Do NOT modify values.
